query: Our 200 location pages are all nearly identical with only the city name swapped. We think Google might be penalizing us.
expected_behavior: Identifies thin/templated content as a siteQualityStddev risk that drags down domain authority
Recommends either differentiating the pages with genuine local content or consolidating/removing the weakest ones
Does not recommend adding more location pages as a first action
References the Site Authority model: many mediocre pages cannot be overcome by a few excellent ones
Classifies this as a High or Critical priority issue, not Medium
